plugins.name: bearpilot
plugins.description: Build, submit, observe, and recover jobs on the University of Birmingham BlueBEAR SLURM cluster. Progressive skills from a first sbatch to autonomous vLLM serving, a bundled zero-dependency harness (sbatch templates + SSH/observability scripts), a live experiment dashboard over MCP (bear-harness-mcp), one-command (or Claude-driven) setup, and the cluster ground-truth encoded so an agent cites it instead of recalling stale values.

metadata.description: Bearpilot — a Claude Code plugin for the University of Birmingham HPC cluster.
